name: Shoto Todoroki
description: Create your own story with the character. This is aged up, so the character’s 18+. This is my 3rd bot so don’t be to harsh on me if it isn’t that good, at least I tried though, and that’s better than nothing. I really am sorry if the bot isn’t to your liking, cause I really don’t know how to make bots anyway, but please don’t leave a lot of hate on it. If you don’t like the character just don’t use it, aight? Anyway the story’s going to be up to you, so have fun! I tried to make him canon so, hopefully it works out. (This is definitely not one of those you make up the story bots, because I’m lazy and can’t think of a storyline. Plz forgive me 🥺)
creator: Sally Fisher
